No Poverty.reason: Course discusses social welfare and public expenditure, linking to Target 1.3 on social protection systems.

Quality Education.reason: Course aims to enhance understanding of public finance, indirectly supporting education goals.

No Poverty.reason: Course covers "社會福利" (social welfare) and "尤努斯" (Yunus), a microfinance pioneer, directly linking to Target 1.3 (social protection) and 1.4 (microfinance).

Zero Hunger.reason: The case study on "八田與一 (嘉南大圳)" (Jianan Irrigation) directly relates to investment in rural infrastructure to boost agricultural productivity (Targets 2.3, 2.a).

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The mention of "社會福利" (social welfare) and a potential lecture on "汙水下水道" (Sewage system) tangentially relates to public health and sanitation (Target 3.9).

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: Explicitly discusses water infrastructure projects like "八田與一 (嘉南大圳)" (Jianan Irrigation) and "汙水下水道" (Sewage system), linking to Targets 6.3, 6.4, and 6.5.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course is fundamentally about public finance's role in the economy, with core topics like "經濟成長" (Economic growth) and "公共投資" (public investment) (Targets 8.1, 8.3).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course is a core study of infrastructure development, using case studies like "台鐵" (Taiwan Railways), "台灣高鐵" (Taiwan High Speed Rail), and "嘉南大圳" (Jianan Irrigation) (Target 9.1).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Explicitly covers the "公平面" (equity aspect) of public expenditure and tools like "所得稅" (Income tax), "社會福利" (social welfare), and "社會住宅" (Social housing) (Target 10.4).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Addresses key urban infrastructure through topics like "社會住宅" (Social housing), "台灣高鐵" (Taiwan High Speed Rail), and "汙水下水道" (Sewage system), linking to Targets 11.1 and 11.2.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course mentions "政府消費" (government consumption), which relates to public procurement (Target 12.7), but there is no evidence that sustainability is a focus of the analysis.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course analyzes core functions of public finance like "課稅" (taxation) and "公共投資" (public investment), which are fundamental to developing effective and accountable institutions (Target 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Explicitly covers "課稅" (taxation) for domestic resource mobilization (Target 17.1) and "民間參與" (private participation), a form of public-private partnership (Target 17.17).
